# Script name

Source: [`src/path/to/Script.jl`](https://github.com/hutx2309/AIECO/blob/main/src/path/to/Script.jl)

## Purpose

Describe the responsibility of this script and what it deliberately does not
do.

## Governing equations

Record equations, literature references, and numerical approximations.

## Inputs, outputs, and units

List variable meanings, units, array shapes, and sign conventions.

## Assumptions and bounds

Document valid ranges, fallback behavior, and known limitations.

## API

Replace `Main.ScriptDocs.ScriptName` with the module that owns the documented
bindings.

```@autodocs
Modules = [Main.ScriptDocs.ScriptName]
```

## Validation

Link tests, reference calculations, benchmark data, or conservation checks.
